creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 165139
patch v1

# change log

www/h2o: update to 1.6.1 and add libressl option

- add bundled libresssl option to port
- HTTP/2 support requires TLS ALPN extension which is missing in base openssl
- upstream expectation is that the bundled libressl is used by default to support HTTP/2
- enables ChaCha20-Poly1305 ciphers as a bonus
- thanks to Uwe Trenkner <uwe.trenkner@greenjobs.de> for the suggestion

# checks

- portlint  OK
- poudriere OK (10.2, 9.3 for all amd64 & i386)
